scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=backend"
scripts.test: npx @testsprite/cli run tests/ || echo 'TestSprite CLI not found. Install with: npm install -g @testsprite/cli'
scripts.test:api: npx @testsprite/cli run tests/api/ || echo 'TestSprite CLI not found'
scripts.test:e2e: npx @testsprite/cli run tests/e2e/ || echo 'TestSprite CLI not found'
scripts.test:auth: npx @testsprite/cli run tests/api/auth/ || echo 'TestSprite CLI not found'
